steps.title: Identify the Community Engagement Opportunity
steps.content: The key signal is the iConduct! program, which community members “learn some basic elements of conducting and then experience conducting the Black Pearl orchestra themselves.” This single program reveals the passage's focus: how the orchestra opens classical music to community participation.

steps.title: Match to the Dual Participation
steps.content: C captures the main idea directly: community members both listen to classical music and conduct it. A, B, and D each highlight only one aspect—composer origin, a specific artist, or a false lesson—rather than the dual participation. That matches choice C — C is correct.
